CustomField.description: PR1064302-565 - Field will be used on the lightning page header for Target records
CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(Sector__c) = "GPS", BLANKVALUE(Plant__r.Name, "") & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Plant_Program__r.Product_Type__c)), " - " & Plant_Program__r.Product_Type__c, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Plant_Program__r.Name)), " - " & Plant_Program__r.Name, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Functional_Area__c)), " - " & Functional_Area__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Plant_Sector__r.Part_Type__c)), " - " & Plant_Sector__r.Part_Type__c, "" ) ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Version__c)), " " & Version__c, "" ), BLANKVALUE(Plant__r.Name, "") & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Version__c)), " - " & Version__c, "" ) )
CustomField.label: Target Title
